texto: Journeys to relive your past?' was the Khan's question at this point, a question which could also have been formulated: 'Journeys to recover your future?'And Marco's answer was: 'Elsewhere is a negative mirror. The traveller recognizes the little that is his, discovering the much he has not had and willnever have.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Italo Calvino que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Journeys to relive your past?' was the Khan's question at this point, a question which could also…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, cities, invisible, com foco em viagem e invisible.
